calendar.matters:
PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar May-29-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diana Cheng Lau in propria persona

The Court noted the declarations regarding the marriage license being issued prior to the marriage ceremony taking place, and requested a revised order. Ms. Cheng Lau spoke of providing notice to her husband of this petition. The Court granted the petition to establish fact of marriage (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION TO ESTABLISH FACT OF MARRIAGE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Continued To May-29-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Diana Cheng Lau in propria persona, (Petitioner)

The Court noted there are 2 issues 1) there is no information regarding a marriage license, only information on the marriage ceremony, and 2) that the Court cannot make any changes on the proposed order. Ms. Cheng Lau stated that there was a mistake somewhere in the process, and has make attempts to find a marriage license and marriage certificate from San Francisco County and San Mateo County. The Petition to Establish Fact of Marriage is continued to May 29, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for an affidavit establishing there had been a valid marriage license issued prior to the petitioner getting married or a declaration as to why she did not have one, and for submission of a new proposed order where the Court will not need to make any changes.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Shirley Le, Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
